title: Cursors for Hypixel Skyblock
description: Cursors inspired by the Furfsky texturepack for Hypixel Skyblock
body:
# Hypixel Skyblock Cursors
![Cursors preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fd21ded1edaa7e106af8621b7c79f78983d7da2.gif)

A simple resource pack that adds cursors thematically inspired by the [Furfsky](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/furfsky-reborn) texture pack, made to work well alongside it and fit a similar aesthetic

Requires the [Cursors Extended](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-cursor) mod to work
